_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve plasticity#: catalog claims NewtonCF/MinimizationCF are 'in NGSolve' — they are NOT at the top level. hasattr(ngsolve, 'NewtonCF') is False, 'from ngsolve import *' does NOT expose them. Correct path: from ngsolve.fem import NewtonCF, MinimizationCF. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (NGSolve 6.2.2604).
